ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the customer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the invoice */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item on an invoice */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the product sale */,
  "cumulative_amount" REAL /* Cumulative amount of the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date and time the item was added to the invoice */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the item information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the sale belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date and time the sale was made */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the sale information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, customer service agent, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the user information was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales performance metric */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being tracked */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was captured */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
